description_long: This is a gold-colored bottle with a metallic sheen, featuring intricate floral and ornamental patterns embossed or printed across its surface. The bottle has a classic champagne or sparkling wine shape, with a wide base that tapers smoothly to a long neck, topped by a foil-wrapped closure. A small, rectangular tag is attached to the neck, adding a touch of elegance and suggesting a premium product. The front of the bottle displays a prominent logo or monogram in a stylized font, along with additional branding and text near the base. The overall finish is glossy and reflective, giving the bottle a luxurious and celebratory appearance. No visible signs of damage or wear are present, and the bottle appears to be sealed and unopened.
description: A glossy, gold-colored bottle with ornate floral designs, a foil-wrapped neck, and prominent branding. The surface is highly reflective and the bottle exudes a premium, celebratory look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main logo, branding, and ornate floral patterns, with the tag clearly visible on the neck.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the continuation of the floral design and the tag hanging from the neck, with less visible branding.
description_view_2: The back view displays more floral patterns and a smaller label near the base, with the tag partially visible.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the intricate side floral designs and the tag, with no main branding visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Gold monogram and text on the front, with additional branding and a small label near the base; a white tag is attached to the neck.
